summary: Rewrote the local unpushed commit to remove exposed LLM API keys from versioned content. Specifically removed PredictionMarketApp/tmp/app-db-dump.sql and PredictionMarketApp/tmp/app-backup-before-rule-hotfix-20260411-192822.db from tracking, added ignore rules for those paths in PredictionMarketApp/.gitignore, and recommitted sanitized changes as commit 9e9e284 (Maintenance). Verified both sensitive files are now ignored and no key-pattern matches remain in tracked files.
current_status: Branch main is now ahead of origin/main by 1 sanitized commit with key-containing dump/backup files excluded from git tracking and protected via .gitignore.
